findings.context: scaled through the use of AWS. ## **Synthesia joins AWS Marketplace** We've been scaling with AWS since 2017, making video creation and distribution accessible to our tens of thousands of enterprise customers.
findings.sentence: We've been scaling with AWS since 2017, making video creation and distribution accessible to our tens of thousands of enterprise customers.

meta.anchor: Synthesia is now available in AWS Marketplace

findings.sentence: As the next step on our journey together, [Synthesia is now available in AWS Marketplace](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/pp/prodview-4gualii44yjze), a digital catalog with thousands of software listings from independent software vendors that make it easy to find, test, buy, and deploy software that runs on AWS. The new listing gives enterprises a streamlined way to adopt and scale generative video tools within existing procurement channels.
